# Telnyx Code Examples

> Official code examples for building on the Telnyx AI communications infrastructure platform. 230 production-ready examples across Python, Node.js, Go, and Ruby.

Telnyx provides voice, SMS/MMS, SIP trunking, AI inference, AI assistants, IoT/SIM management, fax, video, cloud storage, edge compute, and global networking through a single API. No multi-vendor Frankenstack required.

## Voice AI & Call Control
- Voice AI agent (inbound calls routed to AI): [Python](./build-voice-ai-agent-python) | [Node.js](./build-voice-ai-agent-nodejs)
- Route phone calls to AI agent: [Python](./route-phone-calls-to-ai-agent-python) | [Node.js](./route-phone-calls-to-ai-agent-nodejs) | [Go](./route-phone-calls-to-ai-agent-go)
- AI live call participant (AI joins multi-party call): [Python](./ai-live-call-participant-python)
- Three-way AI interpreter (real-time translation bridge): [Python](./three-way-ai-interpreter-python)
- AI sales coach whisper (live coaching during calls): [Python](./ai-sales-coach-whisper-python)
- Warm transfer with AI briefing: [Python](./warm-transfer-ai-briefing-python)
- AI conference moderator: [Python](./ai-conference-moderator-python)
- Conference call with AI summary: [Python](./conference-call-with-ai-summary-python)
- Deepfake voice detector: [Python](./deepfake-voice-detector-python)
- Call sentiment live escalation: [Python](./call-sentiment-live-escalation-python)
- IVR phone menu: [Python](./build-ivr-phone-menu-python) | [Node.js](./build-ivr-phone-menu-nodejs)
- Call recording: [Python](./record-phone-calls-python) | [Node.js](./record-phone-calls-nodejs)
- Call forwarding: [Python](./call-forwarding-python)
- Call whisper monitoring: [Python](./call-whisper-monitoring-python)
- Text-to-speech phone call: [Python](./text-to-speech-phone-call-python) | [Node.js](./text-to-speech-phone-call-nodejs)
- Conference calling: [Python](./build-conference-calling-python)
- Transfer live calls: [Python](./transfer-live-phone-calls-python)
- Outbound phone call: [Python](./make-outbound-phone-call-python) | [Node.js](./make-outbound-phone-call-nodejs)
- WebRTC browser calling: [Python](./webrtc-browser-calling-python)
- Real-time call intelligence dashboard: [Python](./real-time-call-intelligence-dashboard-python)
- Full-stack AI contact center: [Python](./full-stack-ai-contact-center-python)

## SMS & MMS
- Send SMS: [Python](./send-sms-python) | [Node.js](./send-sms-nodejs) | [Go](./send-sms-go) | [Ruby](./send-sms-ruby)
- Receive SMS webhook: [Python](./receive-sms-webhook-python) | [Node.js](./receive-sms-webhook-nodejs)
- Send bulk SMS: [Python](./send-bulk-sms-python) | [Node.js](./send-bulk-sms-nodejs)
- SMS two-factor auth: [Python](./sms-two-factor-auth-python) | [Node.js](./sms-two-factor-auth-nodejs)
- Send MMS picture message: [Python](./send-mms-picture-message-python)
- SMS auto-reply bot: [Python](./sms-auto-reply-bot-python)
- SMS chatbot with conversation memory: [Python](./sms-chatbot-with-conversation-memory-python)
- SMS drip campaign engine: [Python](./sms-drip-campaign-engine-python)
- SMS escape room game: [Python](./sms-escape-room-game-python)
- WhatsApp order tracking: [Python](./whatsapp-order-tracking-notifications-python)
- WhatsApp-SMS bridge: [Python](./whatsapp-sms-bridge-python)

## AI Assistants
- Create AI assistant: [Python](./create-ai-assistant-python) | [Node.js](./create-ai-assistant-nodejs)
- Chat with AI assistant: [Python](./chat-with-ai-assistant-python) | [Node.js](./chat-with-ai-assistant-nodejs)

- Clone AI assistant: [Python](./clone-ai-assistant-python)
- Update AI assistant: [Python](./update-ai-assistant-python)

- AI assistant multi-tool: [Python](./ai-assistant-multi-tool-python)
- Webhook debugger AI assistant: [Python](./webhook-debugger-ai-assistant-python)

## AI Inference (LLM)
- Run LLM inference: [Python](./run-llm-inference-python) | [Node.js](./run-llm-inference-nodejs)
- OpenAI-compatible drop-in replacement for inference
- Models: Llama, Kimi, GLM, Mistral, and more

## SIP Trunking
- Setup SIP trunk: [Python](./setup-sip-trunk-python) | [Node.js](./setup-sip-trunk-nodejs) | [Go](./setup-sip-trunk-go)

- SIP failover routing: [Python](./sip-failover-routing-python)
- Configure SIP codecs: [Python](./configure-sip-codecs-python)
- SIP load balancer health check: [Python](./sip-load-balancer-health-check-python)
- SIP trunking failover monitor: [Python](./sip-trunking-failover-monitor-python)

- Wireless fleet activation portal: [Python](./wireless-fleet-activation-portal-python)
- SIM fleet data usage anomaly detector: [Python](./sim-fleet-data-usage-anomaly-detector-python)

## Industry Solutions
- Healthcare: [after-hours-nurse-triage](./after-hours-nurse-triage-python), [prescription-refill-line](./prescription-refill-line-python), [patient-appointment-engine](./patient-appointment-engine-python)
- Real estate: [ai-real-estate-showing-scheduler](./ai-real-estate-showing-scheduler-python), [maintenance-request-dispatch](./maintenance-request-dispatch-python)
- Financial services: [fraud-alert-verification](./fraud-alert-verification-python), [payment-reminder-escalation](./payment-reminder-escalation-python)
- E-commerce: [abandoned-cart-recovery](./abandoned-cart-recovery-python), [ecommerce-order-status-bot](./ecommerce-order-status-bot-python)
- Hospitality: [hotel-guest-services](./hotel-guest-services-python), [restaurant-reservation-waitlist](./restaurant-reservation-waitlist-python)
- Legal: [law-firm-client-intake](./law-firm-client-intake-python), [ai-deposition-assistant](./ai-deposition-assistant-python)
- Staffing: [shift-fill-engine](./shift-fill-engine-python), [interview-screen-scheduler](./interview-screen-scheduler-python)
- Insurance: [insurance-claims-intake](./insurance-claims-intake-python), [policy-renewal-campaign](./policy-renewal-campaign-python)
